title: Attack
description: Defines an entity's melee attack and any additional effects on it.

oneOf.description: The fixed amount of damage the melee attack deals.
Range of the random amount of damage the melee attack deals

damage.description: Amount of damage the melee attack deals.

effect_duration.description: Duration in seconds of the status ailment applied to the damaged entity.

effect_name.description: Name of the status ailment to apply to an entity attacked by this entity's melee attack.
